inputs.label: Boat Price
inputs.businessContext: The total price of the boat.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Sales tax rate applied to the boat purchase.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the loan in years.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate as a percentage.

formulas.monthlyPayment: const boatPrice = inputs.boatPrice; const salesTaxRate = inputs.salesTaxRate; const downPayment = inputs.downPayment; const tradeInValue = inputs.tradeInValue; const annualInterestRate = inputs.annualInterestRate; const loanTerm = inputs.loanTerm; const P = (boatPrice * (1 + salesTaxRate / 100)) - downPayment - tradeInValue; const n = loanTerm * 12; if (annualInterestRate === 0) { return P / n; } const r = annualInterestRate / (12 * 100); return P * (r * (1 + r) ** n) / ((1 + r) ** n - 1);
formulas.totalInterest: const boatPrice = inputs.boatPrice; const salesTaxRate = inputs.salesTaxRate; const downPayment = inputs.downPayment; const tradeInValue = inputs.tradeInValue; const annualInterestRate = inputs.annualInterestRate; const loanTerm = inputs.loanTerm; const P = (boatPrice * (1 + salesTaxRate / 100)) - downPayment - tradeInValue; const n = loanTerm * 12; let M; if (annualInterestRate === 0) { M = P / n; } else { const r = annualInterestRate / (12 * 100); M = P * (r * (1 + r) ** n) / ((1 + r) ** n - 1); } return M * n - P;
formulas.totalCost: const boatPrice = inputs.boatPrice; const salesTaxRate = inputs.salesTaxRate; const downPayment = inputs.downPayment; const tradeInValue = inputs.tradeInValue; const annualInterestRate = inputs.annualInterestRate; const loanTerm = inputs.loanTerm; const P = (boatPrice * (1 + salesTaxRate / 100)) - downPayment - tradeInValue; const n = loanTerm * 12; let M; if (annualInterestRate === 0) { M = P / n; } else { const r = annualInterestRate / (12 * 100); M = P * (r * (1 + r) ** n) / ((1 + r) ** n - 1); } return M * n;
formulas.principal: const boatPrice = inputs.boatPrice; const salesTaxRate = inputs.salesTaxRate; const downPayment = inputs.downPayment; const tradeInValue = inputs.tradeInValue; return (boatPrice * (1 + salesTaxRate / 100)) - downPayment - tradeInValue;
